mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, user_id, nickname, energy, mood, intimacy, `exp`, `level`, last_login_date, last_energy_reset_date, last_mood_reset_date, consecutive_days
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_desktop_pet
create_time,
update_time,
user_id,
nickname,
energy,
mood,
intimacy,
`exp`,
`level`,
last_login_date,
last_energy_reset_date,
last_mood_reset_date,
consecutive_days,
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{energy,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{mood,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{intimacy,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{exp,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{lastLoginDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{lastEnergyResetDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{lastMoodResetDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{consecutiveDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update tb_desktop_pet
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
energy = #{energy,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mood = #{mood,jdbcType=TINYINT},
intimacy = #{intimacy,jdbcType=TINYINT},
`exp` = #{exp,jdbcType=TINYINT},
`level` = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_login_date = #{lastLoginDate,jdbcType=DATE},
last_energy_reset_date = #{lastEnergyResetDate,jdbcType=DATE},
last_mood_reset_date = #{lastMoodResetDate,jdbcType=DATE},
consecutive_days = #{consecutiveDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_desktop_pet set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, energy = #{energy,jdbcType=TINYINT}, mood = #{mood,jdbcType=TINYINT}, intimacy = #{intimacy,jdbcType=TINYINT}, `exp` = #{exp,jdbcType=TINYINT}, `level` = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_login_date = #{lastLoginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, last_energy_reset_date = #{lastEnergyResetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, last_mood_reset_date = #{lastMoodResetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, consecutive_days = #{consecutiveDays,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into tb_desktop_pet (create_time, update_time, user_id, nickname, energy, mood, intimacy, `exp`, `level`, last_login_date, last_energy_reset_date, last_mood_reset_date, consecutive_days ) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.energy,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.mood,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.intimacy,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.exp,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.lastLoginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.lastEnergyResetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.lastMoodResetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.consecutiveDays,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
on duplicate key update create_time=values(create_time), update_time=values(update_time), user_id=values(user_id), nickname=values(nickname), energy=values(energy), mood=values(mood), intimacy=values(intimacy), `exp`=values(`exp`), `level`=values(`level`), last_login_date=values(last_login_date), last_energy_reset_date=values(last_energy_reset_date), last_mood_reset_date=values(last_mood_reset_date), consecutive_days=values(consecutive_days)
mapper.delete:
delete from tb_desktop_pet where id in
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update.foreach:
update tb_desktop_pet
create_time = #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
nickname = #{item.nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
energy = #{item.energy,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mood = #{item.mood,jdbcType=TINYINT},
intimacy = #{item.intimacy,jdbcType=TINYINT},
`exp` = #{item.exp,jdbcType=TINYINT},
`level` = #{item.level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

insert into tb_desktop_pet (create_time, update_time, user_id, nickname, energy, mood, intimacy, `exp`, `level`, last_login_date, last_energy_reset_date, last_mood_reset_date, consecutive_days ) values

DEFAULT

)

insert into tb_desktop_pet
id,
create_time, update_time, user_id, nickname, energy, mood, intimacy, `exp`, `level`, last_login_date, last_energy_reset_date, last_mood_reset_date, consecutive_days,
values
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{energy,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{mood,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{intimacy,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{exp,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{lastLoginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{lastEnergyResetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{lastMoodResetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{consecutiveDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, energy = #{energy,jdbcType=TINYINT}, mood = #{mood,jdbcType=TINYINT}, intimacy = #{intimacy,jdbcType=TINYINT}, `exp` = #{exp,jdbcType=TINYINT}, `level` = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER}, last_login_date = #{lastLoginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, last_energy_reset_date = #{lastEnergyResetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, last_mood_reset_date = #{lastMoodResetDate,jdbcType=DATE}, consecutive_days = #{consecutiveDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},

insert into tb_desktop_pet
id,
create_time,
update_time,
user_id,
nickname,
energy,
mood,
intimacy,
`exp`,
`level`,
last_login_date,
last_energy_reset_date,
last_mood_reset_date,
consecutive_days,
values
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{energy,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{mood,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{intimacy,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{exp,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{lastLoginDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{lastEnergyResetDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{lastMoodResetDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{consecutiveDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
nickname = #{nickname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
energy = #{energy,jdbcType=TINYINT},
mood = #{mood,jdbcType=TINYINT},
intimacy = #{intimacy,jdbcType=TINYINT},
`exp` = #{exp,jdbcType=TINYINT},
`level` = #{level,jdbcType=INTEGER},
last_login_date = #{lastLoginDate,jdbcType=DATE},
last_energy_reset_date = #{lastEnergyResetDate,jdbcType=DATE},
last_mood_reset_date = #{lastMoodResetDate,jdbcType=DATE},
consecutive_days = #{consecutiveDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.select: select floor((COALESCE(level, 1) - 1) / 10) * 10 + 1 as levelRangeStart, floor((COALESCE(level, 1) - 1) / 10) * 10 + 10 as levelRangeEnd, count(*) as count from tb_desktop_pet group by levelRangeStart, levelRangeEnd order by levelRangeStart
select COALESCE(energy, 0) as energy, count(*) as count from tb_desktop_pet group by COALESCE(energy, 0) order by energy
select COALESCE(mood, 0) as mood, count(*) as count from tb_desktop_pet group by COALESCE(mood, 0) order by mood
select COALESCE(intimacy, 0) as intimacy, count(*) as count from tb_desktop_pet group by COALESCE(intimacy, 0) order by intimacy

select p.id as petId, p.nickname as petNickname, COALESCE(p.level, 0) as petLevel, u.nickname as userNickname from tb_desktop_pet p left join tb_user u on p.user_id = u.id order by COALESCE(p.level, 0) desc limit #{limit}
